story: I want to view a sample stock watchlist dashboard so that I can compare educational risk briefings.
acceptance_criteria: The website shows at least three stocks.
Each stock includes ticker, mock price, risk level, and briefing.

story: I want to add a supported ticker to my watchlist so that I can focus on examples I am studying.
I want to inspect tests and deployment files so that I can verify testing, CI/CD, and Docker evidence.
acceptance_criteria: CI workflow includes pytest and Docker build.
